project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 9-app mega-ecosystem with 15 shared packages, expanding to 23 packages
build_system: npm workspaces monorepo - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network, all code self-contained, no external deps
test_framework: Custom lightweight test runner (node scripts/test.js) - validates file existence, exports, type annotations
verification_instructions: 1. Run node scripts/test.js to validate structure. 2. Verify new files exist with substantial content (200+ lines). 3. Check consistent patterns across all new packages.
setup_instructions: No setup - Node.js v22 pre-installed. All code written directly with no external deps.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - NO npm install, NO external packages. All code must be self-contained TypeScript. Use only Node.js built-in APIs. Write complete implementations inline. Files should be 200-400 lines each with real business logic, real algorithms.
contribution_requirements: 1. Each package follows src/index.ts barrel export pattern. 2. Class-based services with Maps for in-memory storage. 3. Proper TypeScript types and interfaces in types.ts. 4. Each file 200-400 lines with complete algorithm implementations. 5. Error handling and edge cases. 6. Detailed JSDoc comments. 7. Production-ready patterns.
key_patterns: Package structure: src/index.ts (barrel exports), src/types.ts (interfaces/types), src/core/ or src/services/ (implementations). Class-based with config objects, Maps for storage, proper async/await, detailed typing. Use import type {} for cross-package references. Consistent header comment style with ====== lines.
relevant_files: packages/ai/src/core/engine.ts (class-based engine with config, maps, methods)
directory_structure:
/ - root monorepo
/apps/ - 9 apps (quantchat, quantmail, quantsync, quantads, quantube, quantneon, quantedits, quantmax, quantai)
/packages/ - 15 shared packages (common, database, auth, ai, shared-ui, realtime, server, analytics, notifications, search, media, payments, moderation, i18n, ecosystem-bridge)
/scripts/ - build/dev scripts
Each package: src/index.ts + src/types.ts + src/core/ or src/services/ for implementations
